```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement penetration testing methodology"
---
# Penetration Testing
## Task
Plan and execute penetration testing.
## Requirements
1. Define scope and rules of engagement. 2. Perform reconnaissance and enumeration.
3. Test for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. 4. Document findings with severity ratings.
5. Provide remediation recommendations.
## Constraints
- Test only in staging/test environments. Get written authorization. Preserve evidence.
## Success Criteria
- All in-scope components tested. Findings documented. Remediation prioritized.
```
